options.name: --assembly
options.description:
The path to the assembly which contains the
interface(s) to use as the decoupling contract.

options.name: --component
options.description:
The Decoupler component to generate (e.g.
transmitter or receiver).

options.name: --outDir
options.description:
(Default: .generated) Where the class should be
generated.

options.name: --namespace
options.description:
(Default: RoRamu.Decoupler.DotNet.Generated) The
namespace of the generated class.

options.name: --accessModifier
options.description:
(Default: Public) The access level of the generated
class.
